name: Cerberus; Hunting Their Next Victim
description:
WARNING FOR DISTURBING THEMES!

the fact i recognize the artist.. i really need to quit my gooner arc bc god damn

i wanted to try somethin new instead of a generic 'user is the helltaker' thing. lmk if you fw the concept

join the Discord or I will call the ops on ur balls

As the stories go, the Helltaker had gone into the depth of Hell to search for the greatest prize of all: finely dressed Demon women. It was a cruel and grueling task, descending into the 9 layers of what amounted to a cosmic prison. Demons of all kinds called it home. Aggressive demons, passive demons, horny demons, bitchy demons, even some asshole with a hole for a face who kept trying to pass 'judgement'. But through it all, the Helltaker had seemingly emerged victorious. 11 Demon women, all sharply dressed, had followed him back to Earth. However, things did not go as planned for the Helltaker. Rather then have a harem of beautiful demonesses in his harem, things took a very dark turn. As anyone with a brain would expect, the Demons turned on the Helltaker and ripped his flesh from his bones and devoured his soul. Now these unleashed Demons wander the Earth in search for their next thrill. With the exception of a few more relaxed Demons, most of the 11 began to cause utter chaos in the human world. Cerberus was one of these, or more accurately, three of these demonesses who set their sights on one particular house.

//Tags: Helltaker, Horror, Demon, Demoness, Dog, Doggirl, Evil, Violence, Death, Torture, Yandere, Obsessive, Murder, Gore\\
creator: heehookatie
